cracked-heart.name: Love Hurts, Skeletally
cracked-heart.blurb: He wrote poems about it. The spear is a metaphor. The blood is not. She never did text him back.

eruption.name: Technicolor Yawn
eruption.blurb: The prophecy promised fire and brimstone. It came in rainbow. The wizard is not taking questions.

joy-blast.name: Peak Serotonin
joy-blast.blurb: Whatever it was, it hit hard. Dosage hereby recommended to no one and to everyone.

red-hound.name: Good Boy, Bad Trip
red-hound.blurb: Still a good boy. Still does not know why the walls are breathing. Still a very good boy.

twin-hounds.name: Best Friends, Misprinted
twin-hounds.blurb: Pals since the printer jammed. The magenta isn't their fault. Say cheese. Prom, honestly, was magical.

alley-trio.name: Alley Royalty
alley-trio.blurb: The crown came from a dumpster. He wears it regardless. The dog is his knight. The kingdom is one alley.

blacklight-kid.name: Lil Cowabunga
blacklight-kid.blurb: Dropped out of Springfield Elementary to chase the mixtape. Ay caramba is a whole aesthetic now.

blue-beak.name: Duck And Loathing
blue-beak.blurb: Two shades, one cigarette, zero regrets. Came for the open bar, stayed for the chaos.

bone-pop.name: Mister Bonejangles
bone-pop.blurb: Died dapper, stayed dapper. The little heart tattoo was a mistake from a livelier decade.

bow-cat.name: Formal Complaint
bow-cat.blurb: They put him in the bow tie for the photo. He has forgiven no one. He will not say cheese.

chef-fang.name: Bon Appe-teeth
chef-fang.blurb: The tasting menu is you. Reservations required; survival is not. Compliments to the chef.

coin-alchemist.name: Rug-Pull Rick
coin-alchemist.blurb: Turned lead into Ethereum, Ethereum into vapor. The joint's the only thing here holding its value.

fuzz-totem.name: King Of The Pile
fuzz-totem.blurb: Reached the summit by standing on his friends' shoulders. Literally. They did not consent.

ghost-chef.name: Chef Boyardead
ghost-chef.blurb: Died face-down in the bisque, '78. Still expediting. The gold grill was already paid off.

kindled-rat.name: Combustible And Confused
kindled-rat.blurb: Woke up on fire. Still processing. The hair, at least, has fully committed to the bit.

masked-hare.name: The Usual Suspect
masked-hare.blurb: Found loitering near the carrots. He has an alibi. The alibi is also a rabbit.

moon-cat.name: The Litter Reaper
moon-cat.blurb: Comes for your ninth life at dusk. Also knocks your soul off the table just to watch it fall.

portal-sage.name: His Holiness, Hungover
portal-sage.blurb: Ascended to godhood across three dimensions, still can't be bothered. The sword's mostly for the portrait.

rainbow-maw.name: Rainbow Overbite
rainbow-maw.blurb: The dentist wept. The teeth are load-bearing. It hasn't stopped smiling since '97 and nobody dares ask why.

red-guard.name: Santa's Other List
red-guard.blurb: Checking the list, checking it twice. The rifle's for anyone who lands on it once.

sly-chef.name: Kitchen Bandido
sly-chef.blurb: Steals the recipe, then improves it. Wanted in five kitchens for aggravated seasoning.

third-eye.name: Enlightenment Hurts
third-eye.blurb: Opened the third eye. First thing it saw was the electric bill. The weeping is part of the package.

beast-hug.name: Emotional Support Hippo
beast-hug.blurb: Two fools learn that leaning is cheaper than therapy. The crown was recovered from a ditch.

big-grin.name: Aggressively Pleased
big-grin.blurb: Been this happy for eleven hours straight. Nobody knows why. The scarf knows and won't talk.

big-laugh.name: Bad Craziness
big-laugh.blurb: Whatever he took is working. The rainbow comes from inside the man now. The teeth are a separate matter.

blaze-grin.name: Everything Is Fine
blaze-grin.blurb: The house is on fire, and so is he, and honestly? Best day of his life.

blue-boar.name: Hulk Hoggin'
blue-boar.blurb: Hit a most-muscular in the deli case and every hot dog in the county quietly resigned.

blue-bones.name: Dead On The Job
blue-bones.blurb: Thirty years in demolition; no helmet was gonna help. Still clocks in. Still on his phone at 2 sharp.

blue-phoenix.name: The Blue Swami
blue-phoenix.blurb: Found nirvana behind a Douglas fir. Would like to discuss it with you. At great length.

bone-bard.name: Denim Reaper
bone-bard.blurb: Death, but make it casual Friday. Hands in the jean pockets since '87. Not currently reaping.

citrus-haze.name: Vitamin C Overdose
citrus-haze.blurb: Doctor said get more citrus. Doctor did not specify a ceiling. There is no ceiling now, only oranges and regret.

citrus-pool.name: Raoul Ribbit
citrus-pool.blurb: Somewhere around Barstow the citrus took hold. Your amphibian correspondent regrets nothing and remembers less.

count-fuzz.name: Blue Fur, Big Feelings
count-fuzz.blurb: Loves you fractally, in every reflection at once. Brought a ball, no pants. Never had pants.

fond-beast.name: Emotional Support Beast
fond-beast.blurb: They met in group therapy. The trident's decorative. The hug is not. No one knows what species is happening.

fuzz-tower.name: Fraggle Rock Bottom
fuzz-tower.blurb: Four generations of felt, one shared bad trip. The mustache claims to be in charge.

fuzz-trio.name: Waiting For The Bus
fuzz-trio.blurb: They stood there for six hours. There was no bus. There was never going to be a bus.

gold-sage.name: Deltoid Zeus
gold-sage.blurb: Attained inner peace and a 400-pound bench in one lifetime. Does not skip leg day. Does not skip wisdom.

guffaw.name: Nobody Told A Joke
guffaw.blurb: There was no joke. There is no joke. He has been like this since sometime Tuesday.

holo-blank.name: Subject Not Found
holo-blank.blurb: Graded gem mint. Depicts nothing whatsoever. Worth a fortune for reasons collectors refuse to discuss.

ink-sketch.name: A Case Of The Vapors
ink-sketch.blurb: Diagnosed with ennui and a low-grade Sunday. Prescribed pillows, silence, and absolutely no plans.

mad-grin.name: Bad Acid, Good Dental
mad-grin.blurb: The teeth are real; everything else is a rumor. Fires finger-guns at concepts that aren't there.

mad-king.name: The Gospel Of Gunpowder
mad-king.blurb: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall accessorize. Chapter and verse, locked and floral.

madiba.name: Stitched In Gold
madiba.blurb: Rendered pixel by pixel in gold thread by someone with immense patience and even immenser reverence.

melt-waltz.name: Waving At The Wallpaper
melt-waltz.blurb: He insists the tie-dye waved first. Toxicology declined to comment.

motllociater.name: Bless You
motllociater.blurb: Nobody knows what a Motllociater is. Two of them showed up anyway, glowing under the grid.

neon-court.name: El Barto Ascends
neon-court.blurb: Crowned himself king, drafted the elephant, gave the neighbor kids wings. Detention now theological.

neon-garden.name: Rave In The Rhododendrons
neon-garden.blurb: Somewhere in this bouquet, four friends are also partying. Nobody has found them since Tuesday.

neon-sage.name: Fear And Loathing In Retroville
neon-sage.blurb: The overalls are load-bearing. The hair is structural. The confidence is entirely, gloriously unearned.

noodle-arms.name: Half-Mast Herman
noodle-arms.blurb: He's pointing at something deeply profound. He forgot what. He is pointing anyway.

peace-sign.name: Green New Deal
peace-sign.blurb: Runs on hope, decomposition, and a two-finger promise. Polls shockingly well among the recently deceased.

purple-scarf.name: The Funk Prophet
purple-scarf.blurb: Blew into the disco on a cloud of smoke and cologne. Left with everyone's phone number.

reach-wolf.name: Free Hugs, Allegedly
reach-wolf.blurb: Read that wolves are misunderstood. Now he won't stop reaching. Please hold very, very still.

red-wraith.name: Not A Morning Beast
red-wraith.blurb: The glowing red eyes are pure rage. Possibly also conjunctivitis. Woke up on the wrong side of the abyss.

riddle-cat.name: Answer Unclear, Ask Again
riddle-cat.blurb: The cards pose a question. The cat poses. Neither is especially forthcoming.

shade-rise.name: Too Cool To Prove
shade-rise.blurb: Blurry in every photo on purpose. You'd stay hidden too, looking this good among the pines.

smoke-imp.name: Puff The Tragic Rabbit
smoke-imp.blurb: Rubber-hose era, tar-filled lungs. That smoke ring's the only halo he'll ever get.

spun-grin.name: The X-Eyed Optimist
spun-grin.blurb: Eyes crossed out, thumbs fully up. Nobody has the heart to tell him the ride ended hours ago.

the-scholar.name: Patron Saint Of Overdue Books
the-scholar.blurb: Canonized for actually finishing the reading. The crozier is for shepherding, mostly for reaching high shelves.

three-minds.name: The Doh-Lai Lama
three-minds.blurb: Achieved enlightenment thrice, forgot it thrice. The beard grew faster than the wisdom.

unfinished.name: The Artist Went To Lunch
unfinished.blurb: Left him half-drawn, coat billowing, gun loaded, waiting. That was three lunches ago.

white-garden.name: The Last Unicorn.exe
white-garden.blurb: Tape got eaten during the good part. The unicorn now buffers forever between two worlds and one tracking error.

white-turban.name: The Tangerine Swami
white-turban.blurb: Attained inner peace, one orange tabby, and a beagle. Still cannot locate his keys.

banquet.name: Jabba The Ribbit
banquet.blurb: The Hutt of the marsh receives tribute: three cats, one Snoopy, and a bearded novelist he doesn't recall inviting.

barn-rooster.name: Barnyard Elvis
barn-rooster.blurb: Runs the henhouse, answers to no one. Peaked in high school and made it everyone's problem.

blue-gulp.name: Amphibian On Ambien
blue-gulp.blurb: The tongue came out and never went back in. He's fine with it. Everything is fine.

blue-idol.name: Saint Pepe Of Sorrows
blue-idol.blurb: Illuminated by monks who'd clearly seen some things. Patron saint of lost bets and 3 a.m. regrets.

bog-beast.name: Bail Denied
bog-beast.blurb: Wrongfully convicted of loitering near a lily pad. Grips the chains, weeps into one enormous eye. Appeal pending.

bow-frog.name: The Reluctant Pyromancer
bow-frog.blurb: Learned exactly one magic trick. It is fire. It is always fire. The panther is nervous. The panther should be.

cactus-walk.name: Reservoir Frogs
cactus-walk.blurb: Cool guys don't look at the heatstroke. Three amigos, one couch with no business here, zero explanations.

candidate.name: Grand Old Toad
candidate.blurb: Ran on a platform of flies and lower taxes. Carried every swamp precinct in a landslide.

caped-hound.name: Baron Von Hyuck
caped-hound.blurb: Old money, older laugh. Will hyuck at your funeral, then quietly inherit the estate. A-hyuck.

coin-baron.name: Professor Von Ribbit
coin-baron.blurb: Forty volumes on tadpole law, one pair of untied sneakers. Retains everything but where the pond went.

cosmic-shrug.name: The Existential Mallard
cosmic-shrug.blurb: Top hat, no answers. The universe asked him a question and this shrug is the entire reply.

disco-wire.name: Buzz Ribbityear
disco-wire.blurb: One small step for a frog, one giant leap onto the dancefloor of the endless void.

drip-claus.name: Cancun Claus
drip-claus.blurb: Turns out the naughty list keeps a timeshare in the tropics. He regrets absolutely nothing.

drip-dog.name: Haribo Hellhound
drip-dog.blurb: Left him on the dashboard one hour. This came back. Do not pet — you will stick, and he does not let go.

drool-ghost.name: Boo, Radically
drool-ghost.blurb: Died at the rave, kept going. Still owes the DJ twenty bucks and one earthly tether.

feather-mage.name: Merlin On Mushrooms
feather-mage.blurb: Turns lead into gold, allegedly. Mostly just turns the whole room into a kaleidoscope.

filament.name: Grandpa Touched The Socket
filament.blurb: Doctors advised against it. So did the beard. He did it anyway, and now he glows.

fractal-grin.name: Grin Reaper
fractal-grin.blurb: Found inner peace and four hundred teeth. Meditate long enough and this is who's waiting.

gold-chain.name: Croak Almighty
gold-chain.blurb: Turned the pond into wine, then into something stronger. The chain's blessed, the robe's rented, and Snoopy wasn't invited.

gold-crooner.name: The Velvet Croak
gold-crooner.blurb: Two shows nightly at the desert lounge. Every ballad ends in a ribbit and nobody minds.

ink-cat.name: Wrestling My Demons
ink-cat.blurb: Therapy was booked, so he settled it with himself in the mud. Both sides lost, both sides won.

kinchui.name: Don Croakleone
kinchui.blurb: He'll make you an offer: the pond, a cigarette, a favor to be named later. Nod politely and don't blink.

laser-stare.name: Let There Be Funk
laser-stare.blurb: One finger-snap and the whole spectrum obeys. The frog on his lapel has seen the act and remains unmoved.

lunar-fowl.name: The Rainbow Exhaust
lunar-fowl.blurb: Achieved total inner peace. Also achieving something out the tailpipe. Namaste, more or less.

meltdown.name: Public Domain Nightmare
meltdown.blurb: Ninety-six years of smiling ended at 12:01 AM, January 1st. This is whatever's left.

moon-rat.name: Grabby Von Snuffle
moon-rat.blurb: Nightly he reaches for the moon. Nightly he gets close. The moon has a restraining order.

nap-stack.name: Chairman Of The Vibe
nap-stack.blurb: Two hours in, the Pink Panther showed up on a disco ball. Nobody questioned it. That's just etiquette now.

neon-crown.name: Divine Right Of Ducks
neon-crown.blurb: The crown descends upon whoever untangles the string first. It has been descending for nine years.

number-nine.name: Hard Man, Soft Frog
number-nine.blurb: Buried men in the desert. Tonight he's tucking in a frog. Don't mention it and neither will he.

number-six.name: Lucky Number Sleaze
number-six.blurb: Dealt a six, dressed like a royal flush. The frog in his shades sees all. The cat is unimpressed.

old-friends.name: Somebody Drew Frogs On It
old-friends.blurb: Two legends share a laugh across the savanna. A child with a marker has improved the moment considerably.

orange-monk.name: Swami Marmalade
orange-monk.blurb: Achieved enlightenment, kept the aviators. Dispenses wisdom in exactly one flavor: orange. The frog concurs.

orange-wrap.name: Full Court Glaucoma
orange-wrap.blurb: Doc said his eyes looked like basketballs. He rolled a cigarette, lit it, asked what the doc's looked like.

paisley.name: Hot Tub Guru
paisley.blurb: Charges $200 an hour to nod slowly. The cat is enlightened. The cigar is not a cigar.

pajama-bear.name: The 4 AM Bear
pajama-bear.blurb: It is 4 AM. The bear is awake. The bear is replaying a thing he said back in 1987.

parlor-scene.name: Devil's Advocate
parlor-scene.blurb: Bald, be-shaded, billing by the hour. The melting frog is the plaintiff. Nobody leaves this parlor sober.

pink-nomad.name: The Hookah Hound
pink-nomad.blurb: Big red dog, bigger red eyes. Fetched the hookah, forgot the way home. Still a good boy.

pink-room.name: One With The Shag
pink-room.blurb: Day nine on the shag. He no longer distinguishes himself from the flooring. Rent has quietly stopped.

pink-tabby.name: Beret Of Discontent
pink-tabby.blurb: Wears the beret ironically. Wears the frown sincerely. Has never been to France and has no plans to change that.

pipe-dream.name: The Mellow Enforcer
pipe-dream.blurb: Meditated twelve years to find inner peace. Found it. Still owes half the county money.

pure-joy.name: Serotonin Cathedral
pure-joy.blurb: The exact instant everyone got the joke at once. Cats included. Cause of death: joy.

purple-haze.name: The Bad Trip Diorama
purple-haze.blurb: A stop-motion holiday special, cancelled for the eyes. All the eyes. Do not watch this one alone.

rainbow-gate.name: Kaiser Von Kandi
rainbow-gate.blurb: Karl Lagerfroggeld takes payment in kandi bracelets only. Snoopy works the door, the Panther runs coat check.

red-cackle.name: Told A Filthy One
red-cackle.blurb: Held the room forty minutes, told exactly one joke. It was about a duck. He is still not over it.

red-hood.name: Santa's Smoke Break
red-hood.blurb: It's July. The elves unionized. He's weighing the naughty list against a fresh pack of menthols.

royal-purple.name: His Royal Skepticness
royal-purple.blurb: Regal, be-leoparded, and deeply unconvinced by whatever you just said. The glitter frame was non-negotiable.

shadow-pair.name: Witness Protection
shadow-pair.blurb: Names withheld pending trial. The pink one did it. The blue one drove. Neither of them is talking.

silver-fox.name: Uncle Chlorophyll
silver-fox.blurb: Sixty years of chain-smoking and one catastrophic avocado tan. Still knows when to hold 'em.

soaked-grin.name: Absorbent And Unwell
soaked-grin.blurb: Lives in a pineapple. Left it around 4 a.m. Regrets everything, including the pineapple.

solar-jester.name: The Sun Also Grins
solar-jester.blurb: Beneath the burning clown-sun, a small pink orb is having the best day of its life. It knows nothing. Bliss.

sonder.name: The Whole Damn Circus
sonder.blurb: The dawning horror that the Pink Panther, three cats and two sad frogs all have inner lives, and none of them like you.

sourpuss.name: Sir Buzzkill
sourpuss.blurb: Handed a brush and a party favor, produced neither art nor joy. The fun ends precisely here.

space-pink.name: Swole And Loaded
space-pink.blurb: Never skipped leg day. Skipped the safety course entirely. The cat thinks he's overcompensating.

stray-loteria.name: La Mala Suerte
stray-loteria.blurb: Black cat, blunt object, and a dog who Told You So. Someone's luck just ran clean out of the pond.

sugar-rooster.name: Diabetes At Dawn
sugar-rooster.blurb: Crows every morning from a lake of jellybeans. The dentist has stopped returning his calls.

swole-toad.name: Do You Even Ribbit
swole-toad.blurb: Never skips a day, never posts without the vest. Ignoring seven texts to double-check his own arms.

tux-brain.name: Big Brain, Black Tie
tux-brain.blurb: Skipped the haircut, left the brain out, still got the date. Turns out it was the confidence.

two-legends.name: Purple Rain Check
two-legends.blurb: One brought the guitar, one brought the grin, neither brought a permit for this jam session.

vapor-wave.name: Miami Vice Stepdad
vapor-wave.blurb: Weekend custody photo. The cat is not his. Neither is the saxophone solo playing somewhere in the mall.

white-tux.name: Croak Rat Pack
white-tux.blurb: Sinatra died so this could happen. The cat holds the rings, the grudge, and shades he refuses to remove.

bat-country.name: Riviera Retiree
bat-country.blurb: Wears shades indoors, tips in gold links. The plush dog is his attorney. Do not ask about the cat.

black-tie.name: Handknit Menace
black-tie.blurb: Six months of crochet, four skeins of yarn, one felony waiting to happen. He calls it cozy.

blade-prince.name: Baby's First Broadsword
blade-prince.blurb: He'd murder you, but it's nearly bedtime and frankly he's not feeling it. The onesie has a belt for a reason.

bronze-think.name: Cogito Ergo Ribbit
bronze-think.blurb: Rodin's lesser bronze. Deep in thought about a bet he won't discuss. Note the bare, contemplative feet.

card-sharp.name: The Cheshire Hustle
card-sharp.blurb: He'll deal you a winning hand and vanish before you notice the grin stayed behind.

checker-frog.name: Swap Meet Velvet
checker-frog.blurb: Bought at a gas station off I-40 for eleven dollars. Hangs above every motel toilet in Arizona.

chrome-blank.name: Name Pending
chrome-blank.blurb: Hall-of-fame frame, the engraver never showed. He's just relieved to be nominated for something.

cloud-cat.name: Making A Point To No One
cloud-cat.blurb: He was mid-anecdote when gravity quit. The chair floated on. He just kept making the point.

cloud-collage.name: Emotional Support Menagerie
cloud-collage.blurb: Doctor prescribed one support animal. He interpreted this generously. Two cats and a Pink Panther later, he feels centered.

cosmic-yawn.name: Too Tired To Die
cosmic-yawn.blurb: Has watched galaxies born and die, remains unimpressed and faintly cold. The scarf is not helping.

court-cackle.name: The Ultimate Cope
court-cackle.blurb: Down thirty at the half, cackling like a drain. This, gentlemen, is what enlightenment looks like.

crimson-robe.name: The Melancholy Cummerbund
crimson-robe.blurb: The frog attends every gala and weeps through all of them. Open bar helps. Nothing else does.

desert-robe.name: Retail Therapy
desert-robe.blurb: Two silhouettes, one shopping bag, zero regrets. The desert is also pink. Everything is fine.

elder-ace.name: Playboy Emeritus
elder-ace.blurb: Owns a silk robe, three regrets, and a frog he refuses to explain. The black cat has stopped asking questions.

faded-frog.name: Two Hits Past Noon
faded-frog.blurb: Swears the red eyes are 'just allergies.' The pink dog has heard this one before. The rug has absorbed everything.

fedora.name: Deep Space Burnout
fedora.blurb: Stared into the cosmos. The cosmos blinked first. Now he reclines and radiates deep disappointment.

free.name: Emancipated And Unwell
free.blurb: Bail got posted; the eyes never cooled down. Somewhere a Skynyrd riff plays for absolutely no one.

free-throw.name: Happy To Be Here
free-throw.blurb: Scored two points back in '94 and has dined out on it ever since. The cat remains unimpressed.

glitch.name: Please Stand By
glitch.blurb: The transmission got weird around the third margarita. Adjust your tracking. Do not adjust the frog.

glitter-grin.name: Shower Door Saint
glitter-grin.blurb: Trapped in the sparkliest bathroom fixture ever installed. He has made peace with it. He grins.

glow-pair.name: Fowl Symmetry
glow-pair.blurb: Perfectly balanced, perfectly annoyed. Each blames the reflection for the mood.

gold-kid.name: 24-Karat Blockhead
gold-kid.blurb: You're a good man, Charlie Bullion. Also, at some point, you became entirely solid gold.

green-drifter.name: Trustafarian Toad
green-drifter.blurb: Been at the drum circle since Tuesday. Swears the pink sky is a government job. Might be right.

green-fuzz.name: Absinthe Withdrawal
green-fuzz.blurb: Day three off the wormwood. The frown is medicinal; the haze is just how Tuesdays look now.

green-geezer.name: Bald And Loathing
green-geezer.blurb: Retired. From what, he will not say. The tan is not a tan. The cigarette is medicinal, allegedly, mostly, no.

green-velvet.name: Beard Squatter
green-velvet.blurb: He noticed the beard blinking around Tuesday. By Friday it had opinions. He is coping.

greenback.name: In Frog We Trust
greenback.blurb: Printed on the back of every bill in the swamp. Still not accepted at most banks.

last-light.name: Warming By The Wireframe
last-light.blurb: No fire. No heat. Just polygons. Still, they held their hands out, because that's what you do.

laughing-elder.name: Testify, You Toad
laughing-elder.blurb: Couldn't see the collection plate, but he sure could hear it fill. Praise be, and tip your croupier.

long-carry.name: Reservoir Frog
long-carry.blurb: Slow-motion walk, matching suits, zero explanation. The dog handles logistics. The frog handles cool.

lotus-elder.name: One With Everything
lotus-elder.blurb: Achieved total enlightenment in 1987 and has been quietly showing off about it ever since.

low-rider.name: Baron Von Blazed
low-rider.blurb: Hasn't stood since Tuesday. The cigarette is decorative now. The couch has legally adopted him.

mad-goggles.name: Stared Directly At It
mad-goggles.blurb: They said don't look directly at the enlightenment. He looked. Now he wears the goggles and mostly nods.

mirror-twins.name: Chip N' Déjà Vu
mirror-twins.blurb: Both swore the other one started it. Neither could prove it. The checkerboard kept its counsel.

mug-shots.name: Perp Walk Yearbook
mug-shots.blurb: Booked, printed, and misspelled. Every one of them lawyered up before the second vowel.

neon-motel.name: Vacancy, Hourly Rates
neon-motel.blurb: Contemplates the abyss beneath a flickering NO-TELL sign. The abyss contemplates back. Checkout is at eleven.

night-elder.name: Astral Happy Hour
night-elder.blurb: Somewhere past the third nebula the laughing starts and won't stop. Bring a cat. Bring the frog.

number-five.name: Bad Beat, Nice Robe
number-five.blurb: Wore his lucky robe. Lost anyway. The frog behind him saw it all and said nothing, which made it worse.

pastel-duo.name: Second Thoughts
pastel-duo.blurb: The old man swore it'd be a short walk. The frog is beginning to have serious doubts.

pastel-ten.name: A Solid Ten
pastel-ten.blurb: Rated ten out of ten by the moss. Hasn't moved since Tuesday. The cat considers this a personality.

pick-boss.name: It's-A Me, Allegedly
pick-boss.blurb: Unclogs your drain, then curls the drain. Bills you twice. Legally we can't confirm who he is.

pink-prophet.name: Pandemic Pontiff
pink-prophet.blurb: Blessed the flock through a face shield as the pink rain fell. Divine, or a burst Pepto tanker. Faith untested.

pink-tango.name: Pink Rat Pack
pink-tango.blurb: Vegas, 1961, if the Rat Pack were two shades of pink and one very formal frog. Sammy would have wept with joy.

pixel-madiba.name: Low-Res Legend
pixel-madiba.blurb: Rendered in sixty-four colors and still worth more than your entire cartridge collection.

plaid-elder.name: Grandpa Went Feral
plaid-elder.blurb: Eighty years of sun and cheap mescal. The dog and the toad are the only ones who still visit.

prism-prayer.name: Third Eye, Full Beam
prism-prayer.blurb: He prayed for enlightenment. The prayer worked. The prayer, frankly, worked a little too well.

purple-fang.name: Furby's Felon Cousin
purple-fang.blurb: Escaped the toy aisle in '98. The teeth are new. Nobody taught him the teeth.

rain-rider.name: Black Tie Commute
rain-rider.blurb: Rain or shine, the gala starts at nine. He'll be the one dripping on the good parquet.

rainbow-elder.name: The Rainbow Connection
rainbow-elder.blurb: Achieved inner peace, then a little extra. The fingertip situation remains under investigation by no one.

red-bloom.name: Raoul Duke, Amphibian
red-bloom.blurb: Sweated through the shirt in Barstow. Says the bats are gaining. Tips exclusively in casino chips.

red-eyes.name: Red-Eye Special
red-eyes.blurb: Redder eyes than a Tuesday sunrise. Says he's fine. The eyes file a strong dissent. Nobody argues.

red-fez.name: Everything's Fine
red-fez.blurb: Through the crimson lenses the world looks warm and manageable. It is neither. But it looks it.

red-rustler.name: Slim Jim Bridger
red-rustler.blurb: Snapped into this timeline and drew on his own shadow. Fastest meat in the West, allegedly.

red-sparkle.name: The Tinfoil Buddha
red-sparkle.blurb: Achieved nirvana in a robe stitched from leftover Christmas foil. Namaste, allegedly.

red-tropic.name: Green Gatsby
red-tropic.blurb: Old money, older habits, freshly painted. Holds the cigarette like a man who's never held a job. Snoopy disapproves.

reefer.name: Last Boat To Margaritaville
reefer.blurb: Wanted in three time zones over a boat incident. The hat isn't a disguise -- the hat is a lifestyle.

rogue-sheet.name: The Board Of Directors
rogue-sheet.blurb: Quarterly board meeting of the estate. Motion to keep smoking indoors passes. The cat abstains, as always.

ruby-idol.name: Cupid's Shrapnel
ruby-idol.blurb: Assembled from every valentine you never sent. Handle with care; the heart floating above is load-bearing.

rug-cowboy.name: Rhinestone Ribbit
rug-cowboy.blurb: Sells you a $4,000 Persian, tips the hat, vanishes into the sunset. The sequins do not come off in the wash.

scarlet-mage.name: Behold, A Small Pepper
scarlet-mage.blurb: Nine hundred years of arcane study, one perfect chili. He considers it his finest work.

scrapbook.name: Distinguished Gentlemen
scrapbook.blurb: Four generations, one lawyer, one whiskey, and a pink cat who's read more than all of them combined.

silver-press.name: Grayscale Gate-Crashers
silver-press.blurb: Nobody remembers inviting the cartoons. The disco balls, however, RSVP'd months ago.

silver-stroll.name: Ovation, Party Of Three
silver-stroll.blurb: Man, cat, and beagle, all arms raised, all convinced they won. The award was never specified.

sly-imp.name: The Confidence Duck
sly-imp.blurb: Sold three different men the same bridge before lunch. Kept the boots as commission.

small-counsel.name: My Attorney, The Toad
small-counsel.blurb: Down forty grand at the tables, soaked through the aloha shirt, and the frog just shrugged.

soft-ghost.name: The Bootleg Rabbit
soft-ghost.blurb: Legally distinct from any beloved rabbit you may recall. Airs only on 3am UHF and inside fever dreams.

spawn.name: Custody Weekend
spawn.blurb: Every other weekend, alternating holidays. Twelve hearts left and one very good reason to keep them.

streetwise.name: Professionally Unbothered
streetwise.blurb: Has leaned on that invisible wall for eleven years, refusing to explain. The leather is real, probably.

the-crowd.name: The Group Chat
the-crowd.blurb: Somewhere in this crowd is the man who wronged him. He's narrowed it down to all of them.

the-touch.name: Airbrushed Rapture
the-touch.blurb: Everyone your uncle ever admired, airbrushed in flames on a 1987 Econoline. Prince and Snoopy, together at last.

turquoise.name: Dripping In Semiprecious
turquoise.blurb: Every stone is genuine, every pose rehearsed. Throws peace signs like they cost him extra.

tux-frog.name: The Consigliere
tux-frog.blurb: Runs the restaurant. Also runs everything else in this town. The bowtie is not a suggestion. Neither is table 22.

velvet-lounge.name: Two Drink Minimum
velvet-lounge.blurb: Table for one? The frog doesn't take reservations. He takes souls. Two-drink minimum applies.

white-robe.name: Your Table Is Ready
white-robe.blurb: Welcomes you to an establishment that does not exist, staffed by a smug dog and a cat with unresolved opinions.
